name: Angel Food Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F (160°C).
2. Beat the egg whites until foamy. Gradually add the salt and cream of tartar, then beat until soft peaks form.
3. Add the almond extract and vanilla extract, then gradually add the sugar, beating until stiff peaks form.
4. Sift the flour over the beaten egg whites and gently fold it in until just combined.
5. Grease an ungreased tube pan (or springform pan) lightly with cooking spray or a small amount of oil.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and bake for 50-60 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Invert the pan onto a wire rack and let the cake cool completely before removing it from the pan.
